headerTitle: Strategic Customer Success Manager  ·  AI Platform Adoption  ·  Enterprise Account Management  ·  Data Science Deployment
subjectText: Strategic Customer Success Manager, Americas — Dataiku (Remote) · $160K–$170K
intro: Dataiku helps the world’s largest enterprises move from AI experimentation to production at scale. Six FDE engagements: assess current AI maturity, identify lowest-friction path to production value, guide implementation, drive adoption, and measure outcomes in business terms.
bullets: Enterprise AI platform adoption — six complete cycles across eight industries: assessed current state, identified where AI delivers measurable value, guided implementation, drove adoption, documented handoff. The Dataiku adoption arc is the model applied six times.

Executive stakeholder management — former GM with full P&L ownership and 40–80 staff. Present to VPs and executive sponsors in business-outcome terms; translate AI maturity gaps into actionable plans stakeholders can approve.

Customer health monitoring and expansion signal — tracked adoption metrics across all six deployments: feature utilization, declining usage, stakeholder disengagement. Intervened before adoption stalled on every engagement.
matchNotes: Honest stretch: no formal CSM title or data science background. Strengths are FDE-as-CSM (six cycles), executive credibility, and AI platform adoption pattern. Dataiku-specific data science knowledge (MLOps, Jupyter workflows, model registry) is a gap — frame around AI maturity navigation and business-outcome translation. East Coast preferred = flag.
